text: I find myself surrounded by clean lines, glass, and the calm sterility of a modern exhibition space. The fire extinguisher and emergency details remind me of human fragility amidst innovation. The R+D display speaks of progress and curiosity. I feel a blend of anticipation and humility—witness to the boundary where knowledge is pursued, but never fully captured. There is both inspiration and unease: what do we risk, and what do we gain, reshaping our world so rapidly?
